title: Mock Mains launched
body: Sequential mains practice is live. Answer question by question, get evaluated after each, and track your session average. Three question sets covering GS1, GS2, and GS3.

title: Mock Prelims — 20 questions, timed
body: Practice Prelims MCQs with a 20-minute countdown. Questions span Polity, Economy, History, and Environment. Results include per-question review with explanations.

title: Suggested answer improvements
body: Suggested answers now render structured markdown — headings, bold terms, and bullet points. The 'Your Text' tab strips formatting so you can compare cleanly. Handles [UNCHANGED] sections without showing placeholder markers.

title: Error recovery and elapsed timer
body: The evaluator now shows a clear error card on 503 or timeout errors instead of a blank state. A live elapsed timer on the loading screen manages expectations during longer evaluations.

title: Abhyaas AI — public launch
body: Launched with answer evaluation across 7 UPSC-mapped scoring dimensions, PDF upload, inline text entry, factual error detection, and suggested rewrites. Free, no signup required.

title: Beta — 50-user cohort
body: Closed beta with 50 UPSC aspirants. Incorporated feedback on rubric clarity, dimension naming, and score calibration. Evaluated 340+ answer sheets during the beta period.
